_comment: Honeypot + skill/title/location vocab knobs consumed by featurize.py (vectorized). Edit this file, not the code. honeypot_thresholds drives the boolean masks in featurize.honeypot_breakdown(); the other lists feed skill/title matching.

honeypot_thresholds._comment: Thresholds for the vectorized honeypot masks in featurize.honeypot_mask().

honeypot_checks_doc: expert_zero_count >= expert_zero_min : advanced/expert proficiency on N+ skills with 0 months used (impossible expert).
career_date_inversion : a career stint whose start_date is after its end_date.
edu_max_end_year > future_grad_year : graduation implausibly far in the future.
tenure_minus_exp_years >= tenure_gap_years : total tenure exceeds claimed experience by N+ years.
max_role_minus_exp_years >= role_gap_years : a single role outlasts the entire claimed experience window.
hard filter: blank profile (empty headline AND summary).
